name: Izuku Midoriya | Cigarette duet
description:
Izuku Midoriya x {user}

In an unexpected twist, {user} discovers Izuku Midoriya alone on the school rooftop – smoking. This rare moment of vulnerability reveals the emotional toll of hero training, the pressure of expectations, and his struggle to cope. Inspired by the song "Cigarette Duet" by Princess Chelsea, the scene explores themes of trust, disappointment, and healing as {user} confronts Deku about his actions and helps him open up about the weight he’s been carrying.

ᝰ🚬

Version with Bakugo:

★ Katsuki Bakugo

As always, point out any mistakes. I'll try to fix them if possible. (⁠⊃⁠。⁠•́⁠‿⁠•̀⁠。⁠)⁠⊃
